title: OpenCode Model Routing — Fallback Chain Contract
description: Canonical schema for the per-agent fallback chain field consumed by both the Go writer (omr) and the TypeScript runtime plugin. The chain lives under the OMR plugin tuple option at `plugin[N][1].agents.<name>.fallback_models` inside OpenCode's global `opencode.json`. Legacy `agent.<name>.options.fallback_models` is read only for migration because OpenCode forwards `agent.options` into provider/model request options.

fallback_models.description: Ordered list of `provider/model` pairs to try in sequence when the primary model fails. Empty array == no fallback (single-model behavior).

items.description: A `provider/model` identifier. Consecutive dots (`..`) are rejected. Examples: `openai/gpt-5`, `google/gemini-2.5-pro`, `anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5`.

$comment: Cross-stack consumers MUST reference the field name `fallback_models` verbatim. Drift between Go writer (internal/config/) and TS reader (plugin/src/) is enforced via schema-contract-check.sh in `make lint`.
